reference: Your baby's lip may be blue due to injury. Once the clotted blood is resorbed, that cyanosis will be gone. However, if not, you may need to take her to a doctor for a cardiovascular check-up.
text: Your baby's lip may be blue due to injury. Once the clotted blood is resorbed, that cyanosis will be gone. However, if not, you may need to take her to a doctor for a cardiovascular checkup.
